name: io.github.pgalyen1987/gate402-mcp
description: x402 pay-per-call agent APIs: Base trading loop (risk/momentum/execution) + data & scraping

environmentVariables.name: GATE402_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional. A funded Gate402 account key to skip the free tier.

environmentVariables.name: GATE402_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Optional. Override the gateway base URL (default https://gate402.app).
